current_objective: Implement the source pipeline so currently available Marriage Project materials become governed, normalized, deduplicated, contradiction-aware, and dossier-ready for downstream work.
next_action: Complete T-001 to lock source authority and active set before any extract generation begins.

task_queue.title: Lock source authority and active set
task_queue.input: Canonical governance files and current Marriage Project folder structure
task_queue.acceptance_summary: Canonical, feeder, and reference-only sources are explicitly classified with conflict rules.

task_queue.title: Create normalized source records for currently available materials
task_queue.input: All currently available source materials plus raw source template
task_queue.acceptance_summary: Each major source item or cluster has a normalized source record with tier, role, allowed uses, and summary.

task_queue.title: Generate atomic extract cards from the current source set
task_queue.input: Normalized source records, source files, extract template, and extract schema
task_queue.acceptance_summary: Atomic extract cards preserve source attribution and are suitable for later dedupe.

task_queue.title: Deduplicate extracts and surface contradictions
task_queue.input: Raw extract set plus canonical governance files
task_queue.acceptance_summary: Duplicate extracts are merged, contradictions are explicit, and canonical overrides are recorded.

task_queue.title: Build the first target dossiers
task_queue.input: Canonical layer, deduplicated extracts, contradiction ledger, dossier template, and dossier schema
task_queue.acceptance_summary: At least four target dossiers exist: one repair module, one perspective guide, one knowledge article, and one product/tool page.

task_queue.title: Verify dossier readiness for downstream processing
task_queue.input: First dossier set plus contradiction ledger and verifier prompt
task_queue.acceptance_summary: Each dossier receives a readiness judgement with missing inputs, contradiction risk, and concrete recommendations.

primary_questions: Are source authority and source tiers explicitly locked?
Have all currently available source materials been normalized?
Have duplicates and contradictions been surfaced rather than silently blended?
Are dossiers being built one target object at a time?
Are dossiers actually ready for downstream work?
